mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, app_id, member_name_cn, member_name_en, account_id, member_type, status, create_by, create_time, last_update_by, last_update_time
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM openplatform_app_member_t WHERE app_id = #{appId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO openplatform_app_member_t (id, tenant_id, app_id, member_name_cn, member_name_en, account_id, member_type, status, create_by, create_time, last_update_by, last_update_time) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{appId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{memberNameCn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memberNameEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{accountId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memberType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(3), #{lastUpdateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(3))
mapper.update: UPDATE openplatform_app_member_t SET member_name_cn = #{memberNameCn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, member_name_en = #{memberNameEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, account_id = #{accountId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, member_type = #{memberType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, last_update_by = #{lastUpdateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, last_update_time = NOW(3) WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO openplatform_app_member_t ( id, tenant_id, app_id, member_name_cn, member_name_en, account_id, member_type, status, create_by, create_time, last_update_by, last_update_time ) VALUES
( #{m.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{m.tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{m.appId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{m.memberNameCn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{m.memberNameEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{m.accountId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{m.memberType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{m.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{m.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(3), #{m.lastUpdateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(3) )
